artPrompt: A loop of eleven tidy houses curled around one shared driveway, picket fences and blank lawn placards dotting trimmed front yards, a faint haze of late-afternoon gold pooling in the empty cul-de-sac; no figures, only the quiet tension of neighbors implied in drawn curtains and identical mailboxes, leafy greens melting into warm ivory pavement under dreamy light, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: The Cul-de-Sac Coalition
text:
{T}: Add {G} or {W}.
{1}{G}{W}, {T}: Roll a six-sided die. Create that many 1/1 green and white Voter creature tokens, then this land doesn't untap during your next untap step. (Every house on the loop turned out. Even the one with the scary lawn gnomes.)
flavorText: Eleven houses, one shared driveway grudge, and a unanimous opinion about the mayor.
